+++ head/devel/p5-File-LibMagic/Makefile	Mon May 19 18:44:41 2014	(r354579)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	File-LibMagic
-PORTVERSION=	1.00
+PORTVERSION=	1.01
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN

@@ -9,6 +9,9 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	tj@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Nice wrapper for libmagic
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
